category_sources: Official SPICE usbredir page describes usbredir as a protocol for sending USB device traffic over a network connection.
source_facts.description says usbredir is a USB traffic redirection library.
display_name_sources: Official SPICE page and freedesktop repository use the name usbredir.
docs_sources: The official SPICE page links to the freedesktop GitLab repository as the official usbredir git repository.
source_facts.homepage points to the SPICE project; the official usbredir page provides usage, filtering, download, and source-code references.
repo_sources: Official SPICE usbredir page states that the official usbredir git repository is on gitlab.freedesktop.org/spice/usbredir.
tags_sources: Official SPICE page describes USB-over-network redirection and SPICE/QEMU usage.
